message:
Add no-mock integration tests for conformance, GraphQL, SDK, and sandbox crates

Introduce integration test files that exercise real code paths without
mock objects, validating actual behavior end-to-end:

- fcp-conformance/tests/no_mock_integration.rs: Conformance validation
  tests running against real type implementations
- fcp-graphql/tests/no_mock_integration.rs: GraphQL query/mutation
  integration tests against actual schema resolution
- fcp-sdk/tests/no_mock_integration.rs: SDK client integration tests
  exercising real request building and response parsing
- fcp-sdk/src/ratelimit_bug_test.rs: Targeted regression test for the
  rate limiter atomicity bug fixed in b1fe1595, verifying concurrent
  token bucket access under contention
- fcp-sandbox/src/url_test.rs: URL parsing and SSRF prevention test
  utilities for the sandbox egress filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
